name: bartleby-monorepo
description: Root tooling for the Bartleby monorepo: husky hooks + concurrent dev orchestration. Component code lives in server/, web/, tui/.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web,tui -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev" "cd tui && uv run bartleby-tui"
